holdings.infoBox: SGRT is an equity ETF with a total of 23 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lumentum Holdings stock at 8.74%, Western Digital at 8.00%, Micron Technology at 7.26%, NVIDIA at 6.51%, and Dell Technologies at 6.45%.

overview.description: The SMART Earnings Growth 30 ETF (SGRT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively invests in equity securities of 30 US large-cap companies, selected based on their above-market earnings growth potential. Constituents are market cap-weighted. SGRT was launched on Aug 20, 2025 and is issued by Smart.
